dialogue.speaker: tam
dialogue.line: Wren! That dock-hand's tangled in a mooring line -- the tide of the island's tilting and he can't get free.

dialogue.speaker: wren
dialogue.line: And the wreck's just past the gantry. If the harvester gets there first we lose our chance.

_note: R3b-2 branch trigger (BR-SLICE). A small, age-appropriate fork at the Hollowgate docks: help the stranded dock-hand vs. hurry to the wreck. Both options merge at SLICE-WRECK. next[] is the merge target so the graph is connected even if read linearly.
